Our Products

SERIES

900M Series Soldering Tips

The 900M Series is our versatile soldering tip line designed for general-purpose and precision soldering applications. Available in multiple tip shapes to suit various soldering requirements, from fine-pitch SMD components to larger through-hole connections.

Model Shape Type Tip Size Application
900M-T-2C (2CF)Bevel / Concave—General-purpose soldering, drag soldering
900M-T-3C (3CF)Bevel / Concave—Medium-size component soldering
900M-T-4C (4CF)Bevel / ConcaveØ 4.0mmLarger joint soldering
900M-T-0.8DConicalØ 0.8mmFine-pitch SMD, precision work
900M-T-1.2DConicalØ 1.2mmGeneral SMD and through-hole
900M-T-1.6DConicalØ 1.6mmStandard soldering tasks
900M-T-24DConicalØ 2.4mmHigher heat capacity applications
900M-T-32DConicalØ 3.2mmLarge joints, ground connections
900M-T-1.2LDLong ConicalØ 1.2mmDeep-access precision soldering
900M-T-2LDLong ConicalØ 2.0mmExtended reach applications
900M-T-KKnife—Drag soldering, IC pin soldering

Product Structure

Multi-layer construction with oxygen-free copper core, lead-free electroplating layer, surface iron plating for durability, and special corrosion-resistant alloy treatment. The thickness of the special alloy layer is guaranteed to 1mm.

Key Features

Pure copper element for higher heat transfer rate. Size in high precision with special mechanical process. Strong tinning ability with non-oxidation. Lead-free electroplated layer with dense coating for longer service life.

Application Scope & Tip Dimensions

Available in various tip sizes from 0.8mm to 3.2mm, suitable for SOJ, PLCC, SOP, QFP, power, grounding, part of components, correction of tin bridge, and linker welding.

900M Series - Complete Model Specifications

Detailed tip dimensions and shape diagrams for all 900M series models.

SERIES

T12 Series Soldering Tips

The T12 Series represents our premium line of soldering tips, featuring nanoscale electroplating technology and pure copper base material. With 35% longer service life than regular soldering tips and durability up to 40,000 solder joints, the T12 Series is the ideal choice for high-demand production environments.

Model Shape Description Application
T12-BB (Bevel)Standard bevel tipGeneral soldering
T12-BLBL (Long Bevel)Extended bevel tipExtended reach soldering
T12-B2B2 (0.5mm Bevel)Fine bevel tipFine-pitch components
T12-II (Needle)Very fine pointed tipMicro components (0603), high-density PCB repair
T12-ILIL (Long Needle)Long fine pointed tipDeep-access micro soldering
T12-ILSILS (Slim Long Needle)Slim long pointed tipNarrow pitch IC work
T12-KK (Knife)Knife-shaped tipDrag soldering, IC pins
T12-KUKU (Universal Knife)Universal knife tipVersatile drag soldering
T12-BC1BC1 (10° Bevel)Angled bevel tipAngled approach soldering
T12-BC2BC2 (2BC Bevel)Double bevel tipMulti-angle soldering
T12-BC3BC3 (3BC Bevel)Triple bevel tipComplex joint soldering

T12 Series - Complete Model Specifications

Detailed tip dimensions and product photos for all T12 series models.

Performance Layer Structure

Advanced multi-layer construction: Oxygen-free copper element → Tin protective layer → Nickel chromium layer → Lead-free corrosion-resistant layer. Service life lengthened 35% compared to regular soldering tips, durable up to 40,000 solder joints.

Soldering Tiny Chip Parts

Very fine tip end of Shape I makes it easy to solder tiny chip components such as 0603. Ideal for repairing high-density-mounting PCBs in cellular phones and other compact electronics.

Why Choose LES Soldering Tips

Advanced manufacturing processes and premium materials ensure superior performance in every solder joint.

🔥

Oxygen-Free Copper Core

Pure oxygen-free copper as the main material ensures excellent thermal conductivity, faster heat-up times, and consistent temperature maintenance during continuous soldering operations.

🛡️

Advanced Electroplating

Special iron plating process provides superior corrosion resistance and anti-oxidation properties. The dense electroplated coating significantly extends service life compared to conventional tips.

🎯

High Precision Sizing

Outer shapes are manufactured using special mechanical and technological processes ensuring accurate dimensions. Every tip is suitable for lead-free soldering with consistent quality.

💧

Excellent Tinning Ability

Highly invasive ductility enables easy tinning with round solder points. The tin plating surface allows for efficient wetting and smooth solder flow for clean, reliable joints.

🌿

100% Lead-Free

Manufactured in a lead-free environment using lead-free materials, ensuring full compliance with lead-free process requirements and RoHS/REACH environmental standards.

⚡

35% Longer Life

Nanoscale electroplating technology and pure copper base material deliver 35% longer service life than regular soldering tips. Durable up to 40,000 solder joints for reduced replacement costs.

Application Areas

Our soldering tips are widely used across various electronics manufacturing and industrial applications.

PCB Precision Element Welding

High-precision soldering for PCB components with size accuracy and quality assurance. Ideal for SMT assembly and rework.

SOJ, PLCC, SOP, QFP

LED Lamp Pin Welding

Smooth and efficient welding with no void-welding issues. Perfect for LED manufacturing and lighting assembly lines.

LED Manufacturing

Copper Foil Shield Welding

Fast heating speed and stable temperature control for EMI shielding and copper foil applications in electronic enclosures.

EMI Shielding
⚡

Power Supply & Motor Welding

Personalized customization for power electronics and motor connections. Improved welding quality for high-current applications.

High Power
📱

Consumer Electronics Repair

Fine-pitch soldering for mobile phones, tablets, and compact electronics. Perfect for micro component rework and BGA repair.

Micro SMD
🏭

Industrial Assembly Lines

Durable tips designed for high-volume production environments. Consistent quality across thousands of solder joints.

Mass Production
